title: Vanilla Circles
description: A Datapack that add's customizable rings/circles of any block of your choice!
body:
# Vanilla Circles

A Datapack that add's customizable rings/circles of any block of your choice!

![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acc339e5fe20abec47e0812e71495a5f17ed4dbe_0.webp)

# Description:
This pack allows you to create a ring of blocks and change it's appearance to any block the player can hold. 

Like this:

![Circle Changing Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fe9ebd6ff00d2b003ded268da43293973e1fca.gif)

# Release Video
